name: Shubhada Polymers
summary: Full planning, wiring and execution across four plants — 32 cameras per plant, 128 in total.
challenge: Four manufacturing plants needed consistent, standardised surveillance with the planning and wiring handled end-to-end.
solution: Konect handled full planning, wiring and execution, deploying 32 cameras at each of the four plants for 128 cameras total.
result: A uniform surveillance standard across all four Lonavala plants, executed entirely in-house by Konect.
